'''jasama''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:dmisteinbergite|dmisteinbergite]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-s-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:dmisteinbergite|dmisteinbergite]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| jasama
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæsæmæth|jæsæmæth]] || [[word:jæsæmæj|jæsæmæj]] || [[word:jæsæmæsh|jæsæmæsh]] || [[word:jæsæmæ|jæsæmæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jasasamath|jasasamath]] || [[word:jasasamaj|jasasamaj]] || [[word:jasasamash|jasasamash]] || [[word:jasasama|jasasama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jasamath|jasamath]] || [[word:jasamaj|jasamaj]] || [[word:jasamash|jasamash]] || [[word:jasama|jasama]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jasafmath|jasafmath]] || [[word:jasafmaj|jasafmaj]] || [[word:jasafmash|jasafmash]] || [[word:jasafmaf|jasafmaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jasamatha|jasamatha]] || [[word:jasamaja|jasamaja]] || [[word:jasamasha|jasamasha]] || [[word:jasamaka|jasamaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jasamath|jasamath]] || [[word:jasamaj|jasamaj]] || [[word:jasamash|jasamash]] || [[word:jasama|jasama]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jasamathal|jasamathal]] || [[word:jasamajal|jasamajal]] || [[word:jasamashal|jasamashal]] || [[word:jasamakal|jasamakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jasamathatha|jasamathatha]] || [[word:jasamajaja|jasamajaja]] || [[word:jasamashasha|jasamashasha]] || [[word:jasamaka|jasamaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jasamathan|jasamathan]] || [[word:jasamajan|jasamajan]] || [[word:jasamashan|jasamashan]] || [[word:jasamakan|jasamakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jasamathaoro|jasamathaoro]] || [[word:jasamajaoro|jasamajaoro]] || [[word:jasamashaoro|jasamashaoro]] || [[word:jasamakaoro|jasamakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|16f482d}}
